data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified branch codex/2a4d-stale-grooming-refine at 69047617 against acceptance criteria: settings expose staleGrooming/stale_grooming, resolver uses dispatch default or explicit configured-agent override with loud FOOLERY GROOMING FAILURE on missing default, APIs list stale beats/enqueue selected/enqueue oldest/status, and route/unit tests cover required behavior. Sanity gates passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
